problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: The key to What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? is CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway — specifically CRISPR gene editing — which would help 19,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
